page_content:
Total Credits

1 See http://www.english.umd.edu/minor-pw (http:// www.english.umd.edu/minor-pw/) for an up-to-date list of approved courses.

2 Successful completion of the Professional Writing minor also requires the submission of a writing portfolio during a student's ﬁnal semester. This portfolio must be submitted electronically to the minor advisor at pwminor@umd.edu by November 1 for fall semester graduation, April 1 for spring semester graduation, or August 1 for summer graduation. The electronic portfolio must contain, at a minimum, the following material:

1. A welcome page

2. Six ﬁnished, polished texts written by the student in Professional Writing minor courses; and
